channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th April

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th April
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pavement outside 41-43 Ryeworth Rd is in a very poor state of repair, 8th April
item.description:
The pavement outside 41-43 Ryeworth Rd is in a very poor state of repair and is breaking up making it difficult for pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Ryeworth Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 8th April
item.description:
2 hour make safe carriage way pothole 400x300x50mm with tarmac (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Delivery lorry parks in the road, 8th April
item.description:
There is a regular delivery lorry that parks on the main road outside Greenway nurseries, it causes chaos going both ways and is dangerous as it is opposite a junction. This is crazy when they could use Greenway lane to make a safer delivery. It is crazy to think that you would need double yellow lines in this location but i also dont know if they would be obeyed if they think its ok to park there as it is!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 8th April
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet
